questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司有五个组织单位 (OU) 作为其在 AWS Organizations 中的组织的一部分。每个 OU 与公司拥有的五项业务相关。该公司的研发（R&D）业务正在从公司中分离出来，需要有自己的组织。解决方案架构师为此创建了一个单独的新管理账户。解决方案架构师下一步应该在新的管理账户中做什么？
question_text.en: A company has five organizational units (OUs) as part of its organization in AWS Organizations. Each OU correlates to the five businesses that the company owns. The company's research and development (R&D) business is separating from the company and will need its own organization. A solutions architect creates a separate new management account for this purpose. What should the solutions architect do next in the new management account?

A.zh: 在过渡期间，让研发 AWS 账户成为两个组织的一部分。
A.en: Have the R&D AWS account be part of both organizations during the transition.

B.zh: 在研发 AWS 账户离开之前的组织后，邀请研发 AWS 账户加入新组织。
B.en: Invite the R&D AWS account to be part of the new organization after the R&D AWS account has left the prior organization.

C.zh: 在新组织中创建新的研发 AWS 账户。将资源从之前的研发 AWS 账户迁移到新的研发 AWS 账户。
C.en: Create a new R&D AWS account in the new organization. Migrate resources from the prior R&D AWS account to the new R&D AWS account.

D.zh: 让研发 AWS 账户加入新组织。使新管理账户成为先前组织的成员。
D.en: Have the R&D AWS account join the new organization. Make the new management account a member of the prior organization.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： AWS 账户不能同时属于两个组织。一个账户只能属于一个组织，因为此选项不符合 AWS Organizations 的设计规则。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS accounts cannot belong to two organizations at the same time. An account can only belong to one organization because this option does not comply with the design rules of AWS Organizations.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：这是在 AWS Organizations 中迁移账户的正确流程。首先，您需要将账户从原组织中删除，然后通过邀请机制将账户添加到新组织中。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: This is the correct process for migrating accounts in AWS Organizations. First, you need to remove the account from the original organization, and then add the account to the new organization through the invitation mechanism.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：创建新账户和迁移资源是一个复杂且不必要的过程。 AWS提供了一种直接迁移账户的机制，无需创建新账户。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Creating a new account and migrating resources is a complex and unnecessary process. AWS provides a mechanism to directly migrate accounts without creating new accounts.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：管理账户不能是其他组织的成员。管理账户是组织的根账户，不能被邀请加入其他组织。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Administrative accounts cannot be members of another organization. The administrative account is the root account of the organization and cannot be invited to other organizations.

answer_text.zh: B. 在研发 AWS 账户离开之前的组织后，邀请研发 AWS 账户加入新组织。
answer_text.en: B. Invite the R&D AWS account to be part of the new organization after the R&D AWS account has left the prior organization.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： B (90%) 10%。热门讨论与考点摘要：这是在 AWS Organizations 中迁移账户的正确流程。首先，您需要将账户从原组织中删除，然后通过邀请机制将账户添加到新组织中。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (90%) 10%. Popular discussion and key point summary: This is the correct process for migrating accounts in AWS Organizations. First, you need to remove the account from the original organization, and then add the account to the new organization through the invitation mechanism.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在设计一种解决方案来捕获不同 Web 应用程序中的客户活动，以进行分析并做出预测。 Web 应用程序中的客户活动是不可预测的，并且可能会突然增加。该公司需要一个与其他 Web 应用程序集成的解决方案。出于安全目的，解决方案必须包括授权步骤。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company is designing a solution to capture customer activity in different web applications to process analytics and make predictions. Customer activity in the web applications is unpredictable and can increase suddenly. The company requires a solution that integrates with other web applications. The solution must include an authorization step for security purposes. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 在 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 容器实例前面配置网关负载均衡器 (GWLB)，该实例将公司收到的信息存储在 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) 文件系统中。授权由 GWLB 解决。
A.en: Configure a Gateway Load Balancer (GWLB) in front of an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) container instance that stores the information that the company receives in an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system. Authorization is resolved at the GWLB.

B.zh: 在 Amazon Kinesis 数据流前面配置 Amazon API Gateway 终端节点，该数据流将公司收到的信息存储在 Amazon S3 存储桶中。使用 AWS Lambda 函数来解析授权。
B.en: Configure an Amazon API Gateway endpoint in front of an Amazon Kinesis data stream that stores the information that the company receives in an Amazon S3 bucket. Use an AWS Lambda function to resolve authorization.

C.zh: 在 Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose 前面配置一个 Amazon API Gateway 终端节点，该终端节点将公司收到的信息存储在 Amazon S3 存储桶中。使用 API Gateway Lambda 授权方来解析授权。
C.en: Configure an Amazon API Gateway endpoint in front of an Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose that stores the information that the company receives in an Amazon S3 bucket. Use an API Gateway Lambda authorizer to resolve authorization.

D.zh: 在 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 容器实例前面配置网关负载均衡器 (GWLB)，该容器实例存储公司在 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) 文件系统上收到的信息。使用 AWS Lambda 函数来解析授权。
D.en: Configure a Gateway Load Balancer (GWLB) in front of an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) container instance that stores the information that the company receives on an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system. Use an AWS Lambda function to resolve authorization.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： GWLB主要用于流量管理和负载均衡，不适合处理授权逻辑。错误： ECS和EFS结合虽然可以存储数据，但不适合处理实时数据流和突发流量。错误：该问题需要解决授权问题，而GWLB无法直接处理授权。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: GWLB is mainly used for traffic management and load balancing, and is not suitable for handling authorization logic. Error: Although the combination of ECS and EFS can store data, it is not suitable for handling real-time data flows and burst traffic. Error: The question requires solving authorization issues, and GWLB cannot handle authorization directly.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该解决方案无法同时满足问题中的关键性能、可用性、安全性、成本或运维约束，因此不是最佳选择。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This solution cannot simultaneously meet the key performance, availability, security, cost or operation and maintenance constraints in the question, so it is not the best choice.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因： API网关可以处理突发流量并集成其他服务。正确： Kinesis Data Firehose 可以将数据流直接写入 S3，无需额外的处理步骤。正确： API Gateway 的 Lambda Authorizer 是处理授权的最佳实践。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: API Gateway can handle bursty traffic and integrate other services. Correct: Kinesis Data Firehose can write data streams directly to S3 without additional processing steps. Correct: API Gateway's Lambda Authorizer is a best practice for handling authorization.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： GWLB主要用于流量管理和负载均衡，不适合处理授权逻辑。错误： ECS和EFS结合虽然可以存储数据，但不适合处理实时数据流和突发流量。错误： Lambda 函数可以处理授权，但问题建议使用 API Gateway 的 Lambda Authorizer。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: GWLB is mainly used for traffic management and load balancing, and is not suitable for handling authorization logic. Error: Although the combination of ECS and EFS can store data, it is not suitable for handling real-time data flows and burst traffic. Error: Lambda function can handle authorization, but the question recommends using API Gateway's Lambda Authorizer.

answer_text.zh: C. 在 Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose 前面配置一个 Amazon API Gateway 终端节点，该终端节点将公司收到的信息存储在 Amazon S3 存储桶中。使用 API Gateway Lambda 授权方来解析授权。
answer_text.en: C. Configure an Amazon API Gateway endpoint in front of an Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose that stores the information that the company receives in an Amazon S3 bucket. Use an API Gateway Lambda authorizer to resolve authorization.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： C (86%) 14%。热门讨论与考点摘要： API网关可以处理突发流量并集成其他服务。正确： Kinesis Data Firehose 可以将数据流直接写入 S3，无需额外的处理步骤。正确： API Gateway 的 Lambda Authorizer 是处理授权的最佳实践。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (86%) 14%. Popular discussion and key point summary: API Gateway can handle bursty traffic and integrate other services. Correct: Kinesis Data Firehose can write data streams directly to S3 without additional processing steps. Correct: API Gateway's Lambda Authorizer is a best practice for handling authorization.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家电子商务公司希望为其运行 Microsoft SQL Server Enterprise Edition 的 Amazon RDS 数据库实例提供灾难恢复解决方案。该公司当前的恢复点目标（RPO）和恢复时间目标（RTO）是24小时。哪种解决方案能够最具成本效益地满足这些要求？
question_text.en: An ecommerce company wants a disaster recovery solution for its Amazon RDS DB instances that run Microsoft SQL Server Enterprise Edition. The company's current recovery point objective (RPO) and recovery time objective (RTO) are 24 hours. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

A.zh: 创建跨区域只读副本并将只读副本提升为主实例。
A.en: Create a cross-Region read replica and promote the read replica to the primary instance.

B.zh: 使用 AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) 创建 RDS 跨区域复制。
B.en: Use AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) to create RDS cross-Region replication.

C.zh: 每 24 小时使用跨区域复制将本地备份复制到 Amazon S3 存储桶。
C.en: Use cross-Region replication every 24 hours to copy native backups to an Amazon S3 bucket.

D.zh: 每 24 小时将自动快照复制到另一个区域。
D.en: Copy automatic snapshots to another Region every 24 hours.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：技术分析：跨地域只读副本可以提供容灾功能，但运行实例成本较高，不符合“最具性价比”的要求。结论：该选项不符合题目要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Technical analysis: Cross-region read-only replicas can provide disaster recovery functions, but they are running instances with high costs and do not meet the requirements of "most cost-effective". Conclusion: This option does not meet the requirements.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：技术分析： AWS DMS 主要用于数据迁移，并不是灾难恢复解决方案。虽然可以实现跨区域复制，但设置复杂，不满足主题的性价比要求。结论：该选项不符合题目要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Technical analysis: AWS DMS is mainly used for data migration and is not a disaster recovery solution. Although cross-region replication can be achieved, the setup is complex and does not meet the cost-effectiveness requirements of the topic. Conclusion: This option does not meet the requirements.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：技术分析：将原生备份复制到S3是一种低成本的方案，但恢复时间可能较长，无法满足容灾的RTO要求。结论：该选项不符合题目要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Technical analysis: Copying native backups to S3 is a low-cost solution, but the recovery time may be long and cannot meet the RTO requirements for disaster recovery. Conclusion: This option does not meet the requirements.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：技术分析：自动成像可以满足RPO和RTO要求，同时成本较低，是最具成本效益的解决方案。结论：该选项符合题目要求。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: Technical analysis: Automatic imaging can meet RPO and RTO requirements while having a lower cost, making it the most cost-effective solution. Conclusion: This option meets the requirements.

answer_text.zh: D. 每 24 小时将自动快照复制到另一个区域。
answer_text.en: D. Copy automatic snapshots to another Region every 24 hours.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： D (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：技术分析：自动成像可以满足RPO和RTO要求，同时成本较低，是最具成本效益的解决方案。结论：该选项符合题目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Technical analysis: Automatic imaging can meet RPO and RTO requirements while having a lower cost, making it the most cost-effective solution. Conclusion: This option meets the requirements.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在启用了粘性会话的应用程序负载均衡器后面的 Auto Scaling 组中的 Amazon EC2 实例上运行 Web 应用程序。 Web 服务器当前托管用户会话状态。该公司希望确保高可用性并避免在 Web 服务器中断时丢失用户会话状态。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company runs a web application on Amazon EC2 instances in an Auto Scaling group behind an Application Load Balancer that has sticky sessions enabled. The web server currently hosts the user session state. The company wants to ensure high availability and avoid user session state loss in the event of a web server outage. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 使用 Amazon ElastiCache for Memcached 实例来存储会话数据。更新应用程序以使用 ElastiCache for Memcached 来存储会话状态。
A.en: Use an Amazon ElastiCache for Memcached instance to store the session data. Update the application to use ElastiCache for Memcached to store the session state.

B.zh: 使用 Amazon ElastiCache for Redis 存储会话状态。更新应用程序以使用 ElastiCache for Redis 来存储会话状态。
B.en: Use Amazon ElastiCache for Redis to store the session state. Update the application to use ElastiCache for Redis to store the session state.

C.zh: 使用 AWS Storage Gateway 缓存卷来存储会话数据。更新应用程序以使用 AWS Storage Gateway 缓存卷来存储会话状态。
C.en: Use an AWS Storage Gateway cached volume to store session data. Update the application to use AWS Storage Gateway cached volume to store the session state.

D.zh: 使用 Amazon RDS 存储会话状态。更新应用程序以使用 Amazon RDS 存储会话状态。
D.en: Use Amazon RDS to store the session state. Update the application to use Amazon RDS to store the session state.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：使用 Amazon ElastiCache for Memcached 实例来存储会话数据。 Memcached是一个分布式内存对象缓存系统，适合缓存数据，但不支持持久化。虽然它可以用来存储会话状态，但在高可用性场景中， Redis 更适合，因为它支持数据持久性和更高级的功能，例如复制和故障转移。这个选项是正确的，但不是最好的选择。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Use an Amazon ElastiCache for Memcached instance to store session data. Memcached is a distributed memory object caching system suitable for caching data, but does not support persistence. While it can be used to store session state, in high-availability scenarios Redis is more suitable because it supports data persistence and more advanced features such as replication and failover. This option is correct, but not the best choice.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：使用 Amazon ElastiCache for Redis 存储会话状态。 Redis支持持久化、故障转移和复制，适合高可用场景。 Redis还提供了丰富的数据结构和功能来更好地管理会话状态。该选项是最佳选择，符合题目要求。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Use Amazon ElastiCache for Redis to store session state. Redis supports persistence, failover and replication, and is suitable for high availability scenarios. Redis also provides rich data structures and functions to better manage session state. This option is the best choice and meets the question requirements.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：使用 AWS Storage Gateway 缓存卷来存储会话数据。存储网关主要用于混合云存储解决方案，适用于文件存储或备份场景。它不适合存储会话状态，不支持高性能的实时会话管理。这个选项是错误的。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Use AWS Storage Gateway cache volumes to store session data. Storage Gateway is mainly used for hybrid cloud storage solutions and is suitable for file storage or backup scenarios. It is not suitable for storing session state and does not support high-performance real-time session management. This option is wrong.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：使用 Amazon RDS 存储会话状态。 RDS可以存储会话状态，但是数据库操作的延迟可能会影响性能，尤其是在高并发场景下。与Redis相比， RDS的性能和实时性较低，不是最佳选择。这个选项是正确的，但不是最好的选择。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Use Amazon RDS to store session state. RDS can store session state, but the latency of database operations may affect performance, especially in high-concurrency scenarios. Compared with Redis, RDS has lower performance and real-time performance and is not the best choice. This option is correct, but not the best choice.

answer_text.zh: B. 使用 Amazon ElastiCache for Redis 存储会话状态。更新应用程序以使用 ElastiCache for Redis 来存储会话状态。
answer_text.en: B. Use Amazon ElastiCache for Redis to store the session state. Update the application to use ElastiCache for Redis to store the session state.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： B (91%) 9%。热门讨论与考点摘要：使用 Amazon ElastiCache for Redis 存储会话状态。 Redis支持持久化、故障转移和复制，适合高可用场景。 Redis还提供了丰富的数据结构和功能来更好地管理会话状态。该选项是最佳选择，符合题目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (91%) 9%. Popular discussion and key point summary: Use Amazon ElastiCache for Redis to store session state. Redis supports persistence, failover and replication, and is suitable for high availability scenarios. Redis also provides rich data structures and functions to better manage session state. This option is the best choice and meets the question requirements.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司将 MySQL 数据库从公司的本地数据中心迁移到 Amazon RDS for MySQL 数据库实例。该公司调整了 RDS 数据库实例的大小以满足公司的平均每日工作负载。每月一次，当公司运行报表查询时，数据库运行缓慢。该公司希望能够运行报告并维护日常工作负载的性能。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company migrated a MySQL database from the company's on-premises data center to an Amazon RDS for MySQL DB instance. The company sized the RDS DB instance to meet the company's average daily workload. Once a month, the database performs slowly when the company runs queries for a report. The company wants to have the ability to run reports and maintain the performance of the daily workloads. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 创建数据库的只读副本。将查询定向到只读副本。
A.en: Create a read replica of the database. Direct the queries to the read replica.

B.zh: 创建数据库的备份。将备份恢复到另一个数据库实例。将查询定向到新数据库。
B.en: Create a backup of the database. Restore the backup to another DB instance. Direct the queries to the new database.

C.zh: 将数据导出到 Amazon S3。使用 Amazon Athena 查询 S3 存储桶。
C.en: Export the data to Amazon S3. Use Amazon Athena to query the S3 bucket.

D.zh: 调整数据库实例的大小以适应额外的工作负载。
D.en: Resize the DB instance to accommodate the additional workload.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：只读副本专门用于分担主库的读负载。将报表查询指向只读副本，有效分离读写操作，确保主库的性能不受影响。该解决方案满足了问题要求，并且能够运行报告查询，同时保持日常工作负载的性能。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: Read Replica is specially used to share the read load of the primary database. Pointing report queries to the read replica effectively separates read and write operations, ensuring that the performance of the primary database is not affected. The solution met the question requirements and was able to run reporting queries while maintaining performance for daily workloads.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：创建备份并恢复到新实例的过程复杂且耗时，并且无法快速解决性能问题。另外，这种方条需要额外的管理工作，不适合频繁的报表查询场景。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The process of creating a backup and restoring to a new instance is complex and time-consuming, and there is no way to quickly resolve performance issues. In addition, this kind of square bar requires additional management work and is not suitable for frequent report query scenarios.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：将数据导出到S3并使用Athena查询适合数据分析场景，但不适合实时数据库查询。这个方形条需要额外的配置和数据导出步骤，并且没有任何条可以满足问题的即时性能需求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Exporting data to S3 and querying with Athena is suitable for data analysis scenarios, but not suitable for real-time database queries. This square bar requires additional configuration and data export steps, and no bar can meet the immediate performance needs of the problem.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：调整实例大小可以提高性能，但会影响成本，并且不能解决报告查询和日常工作负载之间的冲突。此外，调整实例大小需要停机，并可能影响业务连续性。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Resizing the instance can improve performance but has a cost impact and does not resolve conflicts between reporting queries and daily workloads. In addition, instance resizing requires downtime and may impact business continuity.

answer_text.zh: A. 创建数据库的只读副本。将查询定向到只读副本。
answer_text.en: A. Create a read replica of the database. Direct the queries to the read replica.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：只读副本专门用于分担主库的读负载。将报表查询指向只读副本，有效分离读写操作，确保主库的性能不受影响。该解决方案满足了问题要求，并且能够运行报告查询，同时保持日常工作负载的性能。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Read Replica is specially used to share the read load of the primary database. Pointing report queries to the read replica effectively separates read and write operations, ensuring that the performance of the primary database is not affected. The solution met the question requirements and was able to run reporting queries while maintaining performance for daily workloads.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司使用 Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) 运行容器应用程序。该应用程序包括管理客户和下订单的微服务。公司需要将传入请求路由到适当的微服务。哪种解决方案能够最经济有效地满足这一要求？
question_text.en: A company runs a container application by using Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS). The application includes microservices that manage customers and place orders. The company needs to route incoming requests to the appropriate microservices. Which solution will meet this requirement MOST cost-effectively?

A.zh: 使用 AWS 负载均衡器控制器来预置网络负载均衡器。
A.en: Use the AWS Load Balancer Controller to provision a Network Load Balancer.

B.zh: 使用 AWS 负载均衡器控制器预置 Application Load Balancer。
B.en: Use the AWS Load Balancer Controller to provision an Application Load Balancer.

C.zh: 使用 AWS Lambda 函数将请求连接到 Amazon EKS。
C.en: Use an AWS Lambda function to connect the requests to Amazon EKS.

D.zh: 使用 Amazon API Gateway 将请求连接到 Amazon EKS。
D.en: Use Amazon API Gateway to connect the requests to Amazon EKS.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：网络负载均衡器（NLB）适合处理高性能、低延迟的流量，但主要用于第4层（传输层）负载均衡。该问题需要将请求路由到特定的微服务，这需要第 7 层（应用层）能力，而 NLB 不支持基于路径或主机名的路由。因此这个选项不符合问题的要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Network Load Balancer (NLB) is suitable for handling high-performance, low-latency traffic, but it is mainly used for Layer 4 (transport layer) load balancing. The question requires routing requests to specific microservices, which requires layer 7 (application layer) capabilities, and NLB does not support routing based on path or host name. Therefore this option does not meet the requirements of the question.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：应用程序负载均衡器 (ALB) 是第 7 层负载均衡器，支持基于路径或主机名的路由。 AWS 负载均衡器控制器可以自动配置 ALB 来处理 Amazon EKS 流量。该选项满足问题要求，是最具成本效益的解决方案。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Application Load Balancer (ALB) is a layer 7 load balancer that supports path or hostname based routing. The AWS Load Balancer Controller can automatically configure an ALB to handle Amazon EKS traffic. This option meets the question requirements and is the most cost-effective solution.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： AWS Lambda 是一种无服务器计算服务，但它不适合作为负载均衡器来路由请求。使用Lambda处理请求可能会增加复杂性和成本，并不是问题所要求的“最具成本效益”的解决方案。因此该选项是错误的。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Lambda is a serverless computing service, but it is not suitable as a load balancer to route requests. Using Lambda to handle requests may increase complexity and cost, and is not the "most cost-effective" solution required by the question. Therefore this option is incorrect.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Amazon API Gateway 是一个功能强大的 API 管理工具，但它主要用于管理 API，而不是将请求直接路由到微服务。使用 API Gateway 可能会增加额外成本，并不是问题所要求的“最具成本效益”的解决方案。因此该选项是错误的。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon API Gateway is a powerful API management tool, but it is primarily used for managing APIs rather than routing requests directly to microservices. Using API Gateway may add additional costs and is not the "most cost-effective" solution required by the question. Therefore this option is incorrect.

answer_text.zh: B. 使用 AWS 负载均衡器控制器预置 Application Load Balancer。
answer_text.en: B. Use the AWS Load Balancer Controller to provision an Application Load Balancer.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： B (76%) D (24%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：应用程序负载均衡器 (ALB) 是第 7 层负载均衡器，支持基于路径或主机名的路由。 AWS 负载均衡器控制器可以自动配置 ALB 来处理 Amazon EKS 流量。该选项满足问题要求，是最具成本效益的解决方案。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (76%) D (24%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Application Load Balancer (ALB) is a layer 7 load balancer that supports path or hostname based routing. The AWS Load Balancer Controller can automatically configure an ALB to handle Amazon EKS traffic. This option meets the question requirements and is the most cost-effective solution.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司使用 AWS 并出售受版权保护的图像的访问权限。该公司的全球客户群需要能够快速访问这些图像。公司必须拒绝来自特定国家/地区的用户的访问。该公司希望尽可能降低成本。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company uses AWS and sells access to copyrighted images. The company’s global customer base needs to be able to access these images quickly. The company must deny access to users from specific countries. The company wants to minimize costs as much as possible. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 使用 Amazon S3 存储图像。打开多重身份验证 (MFA) 和公共存储桶访问。为客户提供 S3 存储桶的链接。
A.en: Use Amazon S3 to store the images. Turn on multi-factor authentication (MFA) and public bucket access. Provide customers with a link to the S3 bucket.

B.zh: 使用 Amazon S3 存储图像。为每个客户创建一个 IAM 用户。将用户添加到有权访问 S3 存储桶的组。
B.en: Use Amazon S3 to store the images. Create an IAM user for each customer. Add the users to a group that has permission to access the S3 bucket.

C.zh: 使用应用程序负载均衡器 (ALB) 后面的 Amazon EC2 实例来存储图像。仅在公司提供服务的国家/地区部署实例。为客户提供其特定国家/地区实例的 ALB 链接。
C.en: Use Amazon EC2 instances that are behind Application Load Balancers (ALBs) to store the images. Deploy the instances only in the countries the company services. Provide customers with links to the ALBs for their specific country's instances.

D.zh: 使用 Amazon S3 存储图像。使用 Amazon CloudFront 分发具有地理限制的图像。为每个客户提供签名 URL 以访问 CloudFront 中的数据。
D.en: Use Amazon S3 to store the images. Use Amazon CloudFront to distribute the images with geographic restrictions. Provide a signed URL for each customer to access the data in CloudFront.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： MFA 用于用户身份验证，而不是直接控制地理访问。公共存储桶访问不能限制对特定国家/地区的访问。错误：此方案无法满足“拒绝访问特定国家/地区”要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: MFA is for user authentication rather than directly controlling geographic access. Public bucket access cannot restrict access to specific countries. Error: This scenario cannot satisfy the "Deny access to specific countries" requirement.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：为每个客户创建 IAM 用户会导致管理复杂性和高成本。错误： IAM 用户无法直接实施地理限制。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Creating IAM users for each customer results in administrative complexity and high costs. Error: IAM users cannot directly implement geo-restrictions.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：使用EC2实例存储镜像成本较高，不符合“尽可能降低成本”的要求。错误：这种场景需要复杂的部署和管理，并且不提供实现地理限制的灵活性。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Using EC2 instances to store images is expensive and does not meet the requirement of "lowering costs as much as possible". Error: This scenario requires complex deployment and management, and does not provide the flexibility to implement geographic restrictions.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因： Amazon CloudFront 支持地理限制，可以拒绝对特定国家/地区的访问。正确：签名 URL 确保只有授权用户才能访问内容。正确：结合使用 S3 和 CloudFront 是一种成本优化的解决方案。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: Amazon CloudFront supports geo-restrictions, which can deny access to specific countries. Correct: Signed URLs ensure that only authorized users can access the content. Correct: Using a combination of S3 and CloudFront is a cost-optimized solution.

answer_text.zh: D. 使用 Amazon S3 存储图像。使用 Amazon CloudFront 分发具有地理限制的图像。为每个客户提供签名 URL 以访问 CloudFront 中的数据。
answer_text.en: D. Use Amazon S3 to store the images. Use Amazon CloudFront to distribute the images with geographic restrictions. Provide a signed URL for each customer to access the data in CloudFront.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： D (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要： Amazon CloudFront 支持地理限制，可以拒绝对特定国家/地区的访问。正确：签名 URL 确保只有授权用户才能访问内容。正确：结合使用 S3 和 CloudFront 是一种成本优化的解决方案。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon CloudFront supports geo-restrictions, which can deny access to specific countries. Correct: Signed URLs ensure that only authorized users can access the content. Correct: Using a combination of S3 and CloudFront is a cost-optimized solution.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 解决方案架构师正在设计基于 Amazon ElastiCache for Redis 的高可用解决方案。解决方案架构师需要确保故障不会导致本地和 AWS 区域内的性能下降或数据丢失。该解决方案需要提供节点级别和区域级别的高可用性。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A solutions architect is designing a highly available Amazon ElastiCache for Redis based solution. The solutions architect needs to ensure that failures do not result in performance degradation or loss of data locally and within an AWS Region. The solution needs to provide high availability at the node level and at the Region level. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 将多可用区 Redis 复制组与包含多个节点的分片结合使用。
A.en: Use Multi-AZ Redis replication groups with shards that contain multiple nodes.

B.zh: 使用包含多个节点的 Redis 分片，并启用 Redis 仅附加文件 (AOF)。
B.en: Use Redis shards that contain multiple nodes with Redis append only files (AOF) turned on.

C.zh: 使用复制组中具有多个只读副本的多可用区 Redis 集群。
C.en: Use a Multi-AZ Redis cluster with more than one read replica in the replication group.

D.zh: 使用包含多个节点且启用了 Auto Scaling 的 Redis 分片。
D.en: Use Redis shards that contain multiple nodes with Auto Scaling turned on.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：多AZ Redis复制组提供节点级和区域级高可用性。通过分片和多节点的设计，可以保证发生故障时不会出现性能下降或数据丢失的情况。这是AWS推荐的最佳实践，满足问题要求。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: Multi-AZ Redis replication group provides node-level and regional-level high availability. Through the design of sharding and multiple nodes, you can ensure that there will be no performance degradation or data loss when a failure occurs. This is the best practice recommended by AWS and meets the question requirements.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然 AOF 可以提供数据持久性，但它并不能保证高可用性，尤其是在出现区域故障的情况下。该选项没有提及多可用区支持，因此不满足问题要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Although AOF can provide data durability, it does not guarantee high availability, especially in the event of regional failures. This option does not mention Multi-AZ support, so it does not meet the question requirements.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然多AZ Redis集群可以提供高可用性，但仅仅依靠多个只读副本并不能完全满足问题中的性能和数据丢失要求。只读副本主要用于分担读取负载，并不提供高可用性。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Although Multi-AZ Redis cluster can provide high availability, relying solely on multiple read replicas cannot fully meet the performance and data loss requirements in the question. Read replicas are mainly used to share the read load and not to provide high availability.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Auto Scaling主要用于动态调整资源以满足负载需求，但不能直接提供高可用性。该选项没有提及多可用区支持，因此不满足问题要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Auto Scaling is mainly used to dynamically adjust resources to meet load demands, but it cannot directly provide high availability. This option does not mention Multi-AZ support, so it does not meet the question requirements.

answer_text.zh: A. 将多可用区 Redis 复制组与包含多个节点的分片结合使用。
answer_text.en: A. Use Multi-AZ Redis replication groups with shards that contain multiple nodes.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： A (79%) 13% 8%。热门讨论与考点摘要：多AZ Redis复制组提供节点级和区域级高可用性。通过分片和多节点的设计，可以保证发生故障时不会出现性能下降或数据丢失的情况。这是AWS推荐的最佳实践，满足问题要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (79%) 13% 8%. Popular discussion and key point summary: Multi-AZ Redis replication group provides node-level and regional-level high availability. Through the design of sharding and multiple nodes, you can ensure that there will be no performance degradation or data loss when a failure occurs. This is the best practice recommended by AWS and meets the question requirements.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司计划迁移到 AWS 并为其应用程序使用 Amazon EC2 按需型实例。在迁移测试阶段，技术团队观察到应用程序需要很长时间才能启动和加载内存才能完全发挥作用。哪种解决方案将减少下一个测试阶段应用程序的启动时间？
question_text.en: A company plans to migrate to AWS and use Amazon EC2 On-Demand Instances for its application. During the migration testing phase, a technical team observes that the application takes a long time to launch and load memory to become fully productive. Which solution will reduce the launch time of the application during the next testing phase?

A.zh: 启动两个或更多 EC2 按需型实例。打开自动扩展功能并使 EC2 按需型实例在下一个测试阶段可用。
A.en: Launch two or more EC2 On-Demand Instances. Turn on auto scaling features and make the EC2 On-Demand Instances available during the next testing phase.

B.zh: 启动 EC2 竞价型实例来支持应用程序并扩展应用程序，以便其在下一个测试阶段可用。
B.en: Launch EC2 Spot Instances to support the application and to scale the application so it is available during the next testing phase.

C.zh: 启动 EC2 按需型实例并启用休眠功能。在下一个测试阶段配置 EC2 Auto Scaling 热池。
C.en: Launch the EC2 On-Demand Instances with hibernation turned on. Configure EC2 Auto Scaling warm pools during the next testing phase.

D.zh: 启动具有容量预留的 EC2 按需型实例。在下一个测试阶段启动更多 EC2 实例。
D.en: Launch EC2 On-Demand Instances with Capacity Reservations. Start additional EC2 instances during the next testing phase.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Auto Scaling虽然可以动态调整实例数量，但无法解决实例启动时间长的问题。该选项没有提及任何优化启动时间的具体措施。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Although Auto Scaling can dynamically adjust the number of instances, it cannot solve the problem of long instance startup times. This option does not mention any specific measures to optimize startup time.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：竞价型实例主要用于降低成本，而不是优化启动时间。该选项没有提到任何与启动时间优化相关的功能。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Spot Instances are mainly used to reduce costs, not to optimize startup time. This option does not mention any features related to startup time optimization.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因： EC2 休眠功能允许实例保存内存状态，从而加快启动时间。 Auto Scaling 暖池可以预热实例，使其在启动时更快地进入工作状态。该选项结合了两种功能来优化启动时间，是最佳选择。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: The EC2 hibernation feature allows instances to save memory state, resulting in faster startup times. Auto Scaling Warm Pools can warm up instances to get them into a working state more quickly upon startup. This option combines two features to optimize boot time and is the best choice.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：容量预留确保实例容量可用，但与启动时间优化无关。该选项没有提到任何与启动时间优化相关的功能。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Capacity Reservations ensure that instance capacity is available but are not related to startup time optimization. This option does not mention any features related to startup time optimization.

answer_text.zh: C. 启动 EC2 按需型实例并启用休眠功能。在下一个测试阶段配置 EC2 Auto Scaling 热池。
answer_text.en: C. Launch the EC2 On-Demand Instances with hibernation turned on. Configure EC2 Auto Scaling warm pools during the next testing phase.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要： EC2 休眠功能允许实例保存内存状态，从而加快启动时间。 Auto Scaling 暖池可以预热实例，使其在启动时更快地进入工作状态。该选项结合了两种功能来优化启动时间，是最佳选择。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: The EC2 hibernation feature allows instances to save memory state, resulting in faster startup times. Auto Scaling Warm Pools can warm up instances to get them into a working state more quickly upon startup. This option combines two features to optimize boot time and is the best choice.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 公司的应用程序在 Auto Scaling 组中的 Amazon EC2 实例上运行。该公司注意到，其应用程序的流量会在一周中的任意几天突然增加。该公司希望在流量突然增加时保持应用程序性能。哪种解决方案能够最具成本效益地满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company's applications run on Amazon EC2 instances in Auto Scaling groups. The company notices that its applications experience sudden traffic increases on random days of the week. The company wants to maintain application performance during sudden traffic increases. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

A.zh: 使用手动缩放来更改 Auto Scaling 组的大小。
A.en: Use manual scaling to change the size of the Auto Scaling group.

B.zh: 使用预测缩放来更改 Auto Scaling 组的大小。
B.en: Use predictive scaling to change the size of the Auto Scaling group.

C.zh: 使用动态缩放来更改 Auto Scaling 组的大小。
C.en: Use dynamic scaling to change the size of the Auto Scaling group.

D.zh: 使用计划缩放来更改 Auto Scaling 组的大小。
D.en: Use schedule scaling to change the size of the Auto Scaling group.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：使用手动缩放来更改 Auto Scaling 组的大小。主动伸缩需要管理员主动控制流量，主动调整实例数量。这种方形、非结构化的系统产生流量快，需要人工干预，效率低下。因此，该选项不符合题目要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Use manual scaling to change the size of your Auto Scaling group. Active scaling requires administrators to actively control traffic and actively adjust the number of instances. This kind of square and unstructured system generates traffic quickly and requires manual intervention, which is inefficient. Therefore, this option does not meet the question requirements.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：使用预测扩展来更改 Auto Scaling 组的大小。预测伸缩根据历史数据和机器学习模型预测未来流量，并提前调整实例数量。虽然预测性扩展可以消除流量模式，但题目提到流量增加是随机发生的，预测性扩展决不能准确预测这些流量增加。因此，该选项不符合题目要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Use predictive scaling to change the size of an Auto Scaling group. Predictive scaling predicts future traffic based on historical data and machine learning models, and adjusts the number of instances in advance. Although predictive expansion can eliminate traffic patterns, the title mentions that traffic increases occur randomly, and predictive expansion can accurately predict these traffic increases in no way. Therefore, this option does not meet the question requirements.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：使用动态扩展来更改 Auto Scaling 组的大小。动态扩容根据实时控制指标（如CPU利用率、请求数）自动调整实例数量。这种方带可以快速产生流量，保证高效使用，避免过度配置资源，性价比高。因此，该选项符合题目要求。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: Use dynamic scaling to change the size of your Auto Scaling group. Dynamic expansion automatically adjusts the number of instances based on real-time control indicators (such as CPU utilization and number of requests). This kind of square strip can quickly generate traffic, ensure efficient use, and avoid excessive provisioning of resources, which is cost-effective. Therefore, this option meets the question requirements.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：使用计划的扩展来更改 Auto Scaling 组的大小。计划扩展根据预定义的计划调整实例数量。虽然有计划的扩展适用于有计划的流量模式，但题目提到流量增加是随机发生的，有计划的扩展是非系统性的，可以避免这种情况。因此，该选项不符合题目要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Use scheduled scaling to change the size of your Auto Scaling group. Planned scaling adjusts the number of instances based on a predefined schedule. Although planned expansion is suitable for planned traffic patterns, the title mentions that traffic increases occur randomly, and planned expansion is unsystematic to avoid this situation. Therefore, this option does not meet the question requirements.

answer_text.zh: C. 使用动态缩放来更改 Auto Scaling 组的大小。
answer_text.en: C. Use dynamic scaling to change the size of the Auto Scaling group.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：使用动态扩展来更改 Auto Scaling 组的大小。动态扩容根据实时控制指标（如CPU利用率、请求数）自动调整实例数量。这种方带可以快速产生流量，保证高效使用，避免过度配置资源，性价比高。因此，该选项符合题目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Use dynamic scaling to change the size of your Auto Scaling group. Dynamic expansion automatically adjusts the number of instances based on real-time control indicators (such as CPU utilization and number of requests). This kind of square strip can quickly generate traffic, ensure efficient use, and avoid excessive provisioning of resources, which is cost-effective. Therefore, this option meets the question requirements.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 电子商务应用程序使用在 Amazon EC2 实例上运行的 PostgreSQL 数据库。在每月的销售活动期间，数据库使用量增加并导致应用程序出现数据库连接问题。随后的每月销售活动的流量是不可预测的，这会影响销售预测。当流量出现不可预测的增长时，公司需要保持业绩。哪种解决方案能够以最具成本效益的方式解决这个问题？
question_text.en: An ecommerce application uses a PostgreSQL database that runs on an Amazon EC2 instance. During a monthly sales event, database usage increases and causes database connection issues for the application. The traffic is unpredictable for subsequent monthly sales events, which impacts the sales forecast. The company needs to maintain performance when there is an unpredictable increase in traffic. Which solution resolves this issue in the MOST cost-effective way?

A.zh: 将 PostgreSQL 数据库迁移到 Amazon Aurora Serverless v2。
A.en: Migrate the PostgreSQL database to Amazon Aurora Serverless v2.

B.zh: 为 EC2 实例上的 PostgreSQL 数据库启用自动扩展，以适应增加的使用量。
B.en: Enable auto scaling for the PostgreSQL database on the EC2 instance to accommodate increased usage.

C.zh: 将 PostgreSQL 数据库迁移到具有更大实例类型的 Amazon RDS for PostgreSQL。
C.en: Migrate the PostgreSQL database to Amazon RDS for PostgreSQL with a larger instance type.

D.zh: 将 PostgreSQL 数据库迁移到 Amazon Redshift 以适应增加的使用量。
D.en: Migrate the PostgreSQL database to Amazon Redshift to accommodate increased usage.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：分析： Amazon Aurora Serverless v2 是一种按需可扩展的数据库服务，可根据流量自动调整容量，适合处理不可预测的流量增长。它支持 PostgreSQL，并且不需要主动管理实例大小，提供了经济高效的解决方案。这个选项是正确的，因为它解决了流量不可预测的问题，同时保持了成本效益。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: Analysis: Amazon Aurora Serverless v2 is an on-demand scalable database service that automatically adjusts capacity based on traffic and is suitable for handling unpredictable traffic growth. It supports PostgreSQL and does not require active management of instance size, providing a cost-effective solution. This option is correct because it solves the problem of unpredictable traffic while remaining cost-effective.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：分析： EC2实例本身可以启用自动扩容，但是当数据库运行在EC2上时，扩容并不能直接解决数据库连接问题。数据库扩展需要额外的配置和管理，可能成本高昂，并且不是最佳解决方案。这个选项是错误的，因为它不是解决问题的有效方法，而且成本更高。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Analysis: The EC2 instance itself can enable automatic expansion, but when the database is running on EC2, expansion does not directly solve the database connection problem. Database expansion requires additional configuration and management, may be costly, and is not the optimal solution. This option is wrong because it is an ineffective solution to the problem and is more expensive.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：分析： Amazon RDS 提供托管 PostgreSQL 服务，但使用更大的实例类型并不能解决流量不可预测的问题。此栏可能会导致资源费用，因为流量值仅在特定时间可用。这个选项是错误的，因为它提供了动态可扩展性而无需剥离，并且成本效益较低。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Analysis: Amazon RDS provides a managed PostgreSQL service, but using larger instance types does not solve the problem of unpredictable traffic. This bar may result in resource charges because the traffic value is only available at specific times. This option is wrong because it provides dynamic scalability without stripping and is less cost-effective.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：分析： Amazon Redshift 是一种数据仓库服务，适合分析工作负载而不是事务数据库工作负载。将 PostgreSQL 迁移到 Redshift 不适合电子商务应用程序的交易需求，因此不符合该使用场景。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Analytics: Amazon Redshift is a data warehouse service suited for analytical workloads rather than transactional database workloads. Migrating PostgreSQL to Redshift is not suitable for the transactional needs of e-commerce users. This option is wrong because it is not suitable for cold use scenarios.

answer_text.zh: A. 将 PostgreSQL 数据库迁移到 Amazon Aurora Serverless v2。
answer_text.en: A. Migrate the PostgreSQL database to Amazon Aurora Serverless v2.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： A (95%) 5%。热门讨论与考点摘要：分析： Amazon Aurora Serverless v2 是一种按需可扩展的数据库服务，可根据流量自动调整容量，适合处理不可预测的流量增长。它支持 PostgreSQL，并且不需要主动管理实例大小，提供了经济高效的解决方案。这个选项是正确的，因为它解决了流量不可预测的问题，同时保持了成本效益。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (95%) 5%. Popular discussion and key point summary: Analysis: Amazon Aurora Serverless v2 is an on-demand scalable database service that automatically adjusts capacity based on traffic and is suitable for handling unpredictable traffic growth. It supports PostgreSQL and does not require active management of instance size, providing a cost-effective solution. This option is correct because it solves the problem of unpredictable traffic while remaining cost-effective.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司使用 Amazon API Gateway 和 AWS Lambda 在 AWS 上托管内部无服务器应用程序。该公司的员工每天开始使用该应用程序时都会报告高延迟问题。该公司希望减少延迟。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company hosts an internal serverless application on AWS by using Amazon API Gateway and AWS Lambda. The company’s employees report issues with high latency when they begin using the application each day. The company wants to reduce latency. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 提高API网关的流量限制。
A.en: Increase the API Gateway throttling limit.

B.zh: 在员工每天开始使用应用程序之前，设置计划的扩展以增加 Lambda 预置的并发性。
B.en: Set up a scheduled scaling to increase Lambda provisioned concurrency before employees begin to use the application each day.

C.zh: 创建 Amazon CloudWatch 警报以在每天开始时启动 Lambda 函数作为警报的目标。
C.en: Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm to initiate a Lambda function as a target for the alarm at the beginning of each day.

D.zh: 增加 Lambda 函数内存。
D.en: Increase the Lambda function memory.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：分析： API Gateway的限流主要是为了控制请求速率、防止过载，与Lambda的冷启动问题无关。结论：该选项不符合题目要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Analysis: API Gateway's current limit is mainly used to control the request rate and prevent overload, and has nothing to do with Lambda's cold start problem. Conclusion: This option does not meet the requirements.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：分析： Lambda默认的并发量可以通过规划扩容的方式，在高峰期之前预热函数，有效解决冷启动问题，减少首次调用的延迟。结论：该选项符合题目要求。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Analysis: Lambda's preset concurrency can effectively solve the cold start problem by preheating functions before peak periods by planning expansion, reducing the delay of the first call. Conclusion: This option meets the requirements.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：分析： CloudWatch 警报可以触发 Lambda，但这并不能解决冷启动问题，因为冷启动发生在函数首次调用时，而不是警报触发时。结论：该选项不符合题目要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Analysis: CloudWatch alarms can trigger Lambdas, but this does not solve the cold start problem because cold start occurs when the function is first called, not when the alarm fires. Conclusion: This option does not meet the requirements.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：分析：增加Lambda的内存可以提高函数的执行速度，但是并不能解决冷启动问题，因为冷启动主要与函数初始化有关，而不是内存大小。结论：该选项不符合题目要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Analysis: Increasing the memory of Lambda can improve the execution speed of the function, but it cannot solve the cold start problem, because cold start is mainly related to function initialization, not the memory size. Conclusion: This option does not meet the requirements.

answer_text.zh: B. 在员工每天开始使用应用程序之前，设置计划的扩展以增加 Lambda 预置的并发性。
answer_text.en: B. Set up a scheduled scaling to increase Lambda provisioned concurrency before employees begin to use the application each day.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：分析： Lambda默认的并发量可以通过规划扩容的方式，在高峰期之前预热函数，有效解决冷启动问题，减少首次调用的延迟。结论：该选项符合题目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Analysis: Lambda's preset concurrency can effectively solve the cold start problem by preheating functions before peak periods by planning expansion, reducing the delay of the first call. Conclusion: This option meets the requirements.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家研究公司使用本地设备生成数据进行分析。该公司希望使用 AWS 云来分析数据。这些设备生成 .csv 文件并支持将数据写入 SMB 文件共享。公司分析师必须能够使用 SQL 命令来查询数据。分析师将全天定期进行查询。哪种步骤组合能够最经济有效地满足这些要求？ （选择三项。）
question_text.en: A research company uses on-premises devices to generate data for analysis. The company wants to use the AWS Cloud to analyze the data. The devices generate .csv files and support writing the data to an SMB file share. Company analysts must be able to use SQL commands to query the data. The analysts will run queries periodically throughout the day. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively? (Choose three.)

A.zh: 在 Amazon S3 文件网关模式下在本地 AWS Storage Gateway。
A.en: Deploy an AWS Storage Gateway on premises in Amazon S3 File Gateway mode.

B.zh: 在 Amazon FSx File Gateway 中本地 AWS Storage Gateway。
B.en: Deploy an AWS Storage Gateway on premises in Amazon FSx File Gateway made.

C.zh: 设置 AWS Glue 爬网程序以根据 Amazon S3 中的数据创建表。
C.en: Set up an AWS Glue crawler to create a table based on the data that is in Amazon S3.

D.zh: 使用 EMR 文件系统 (EMRFS) 设置 Amazon EMR 集群以查询 Amazon S3 中的数据。为分析师提供访问权限。
D.en: Set up an Amazon EMR cluster with EMR File System (EMRFS) to query the data that is in Amazon S3. Provide access to analysts.

E.zh: 设置 Amazon Redshift 集群来查询 Amazon S3 中的数据。为分析师提供访问权限。
E.en: Set up an Amazon Redshift cluster to query the data that is in Amazon S3. Provide access to analysts.

F.zh: 设置 Amazon Athena 以查询 Amazon S3 中的数据。为分析师提供访问权限。
F.en: Setup Amazon Athena to query the data that is in Amazon S3. Provide access to analysts.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：在 Amazon S3 文件网关模式下在本地部署 AWS Storage Gateway。分析：正确。 Amazon S3 文件网关模式允许将本地生成的 .csv 文件上传到 Amazon S3，满足数据存储需求并支持后处理分析。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: Deploy an AWS Storage Gateway on premises in Amazon S3 File Gateway mode. Analysis: Correct. Amazon S3 File Gateway mode allows locally generated .csv files to be uploaded to Amazon S3, meeting data storage needs and supporting post-processing analysis.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：在 Amazon FSx 文件网关模式下在本地部署 AWS Storage Gateway。分析：错误。 Amazon FSx 文件网关主要用于与 FSx 文件系统集成。该问题需要将数据存储在Amazon S3中，因此不适合。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Deploy an AWS Storage Gateway on premises in Amazon FSx File Gateway mode. Analysis: Error. Amazon FSx File Gateway is mainly used to integrate with FSx file systems. The problem requires data to be stored in Amazon S3, so it is not suitable.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：设置 AWS Glue 爬网程序以根据 Amazon S3 中的数据创建表。分析：正确。 AWS Glue 可以自动扫描 Amazon S3 中存储的 .csv 文件并创建表结构以方便后续 SQL 查询。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: Set up an AWS Glue crawler to create a table based on the data that is in Amazon S3. Analysis: Correct. AWS Glue can automatically scan .csv files stored in Amazon S3 and create table structures to facilitate subsequent SQL queries.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：分析师。分析：错误。 EMR虽然可以查询S3中的数据，但通常用于大规模数据处理，成本较高，不符合“最具性价比”话题的要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: analysts. analysis: Error. Although EMR can query data in S3, it is usually used for large-scale data processing, has a high cost, and does not meet the requirements of the "most cost-effective" topic.

E.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：设置 Amazon Redshift 集群来查询 Amazon S3 中的数据。为分析师提供访问权限。分析：错误。 Amazon Redshift适合处理结构化数据仓库，但设置和运行成本较高，不符合“最具性价比”题目要求。
E.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Set up an Amazon Redshift cluster to query the data that is in Amazon S3. Provide access to analysts. Analytics: Error. Amazon Redshift is suitable for processing structured data warehouses, but the setup and running costs are high and does not meet the requirements of the title "most cost-effective".

F.zh: 正確。技术原因：设置 Amazon Athena 以查询 Amazon S3 中的数据。为分析师提供访问权限。分析：正确。 Amazon Athena 是一种无服务器查询服务，支持直接查询 Amazon S3 中存储的数据，并按查询付费，非常简单。
F.en: Correct. Technical reason: Setup Amazon Athena to query the data that is in Amazon S3. Provide access to analysts. Analytics: Correct. Amazon Athena is a serverless query service that supports direct querying of data stored in Amazon S3 and pays per query, which is very simple.

answer_text.zh: A. 在 Amazon S3 文件网关模式下在本地 AWS Storage Gateway。；C. 设置 AWS Glue 爬网程序以根据 Amazon S3 中的数据创建表。；F. 设置 Amazon Athena 以查询 Amazon S3 中的数据。为分析师提供访问权限。
answer_text.en: A. Deploy an AWS Storage Gateway on premises in Amazon S3 File Gateway mode.; C. Set up an AWS Glue crawler to create a table based on the data that is in Amazon S3.; F. Setup Amazon Athena to query the data that is in Amazon S3. Provide access to analysts.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： ACF (96%) 4%。热门讨论与考点摘要：在 Amazon S3 文件网关模式下在本地部署 AWS Storage Gateway。分析：正确。 Amazon S3 文件网关模式允许将本地生成的 .csv 文件上传到 Amazon S3，满足数据存储需求并支持后处理分析。；设置 AWS Glue 爬网程序以根据 Amazon S3 中的数据创建表。分析：正确。 AWS Glue 可以自动扫描 Amazon S3 中存储的 .csv 文件并创建表结构以方便后续 SQL 查询。；设置 Amazon Athena 以查询 Amazon S3 中的数据。为分析师提供访问权限。分析：正确。 Amazon Athena 是一种无服务器查询服务，支持直接查询 Amazon S3 中存储的数据，并按查询付费，非常简单。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: ACF (96%) 4%. Popular discussion and key point summary: Deploy an AWS Storage Gateway on premises in Amazon S3 File Gateway mode. Analysis: Correct. Amazon S3 File Gateway mode allows locally generated .csv files to be uploaded to Amazon S3, meeting data storage needs and supporting post-processing analysis.; Set up an AWS Glue crawler to create a table based on the data that is in Amazon S3. Analysis: Correct. AWS Glue can automatically scan .csv files stored in Amazon S3 and create table structures to facilitate subsequent SQL queries.; Setup Amazon Athena to query the data that is in Amazon S3. Provide access to analysts. Analytics: Correct. Amazon Athena is a serverless query service that supports direct querying of data stored in Amazon S3 and pays per query, which is very simple.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望使用 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 集群和 Amazon RDS 数据库实例来构建和运行支付处理应用程序。出于合规性目的，该公司将在其本地数据中心运行该应用程序。解决方案架构师希望使用 AWS Outposts 作为解决方案的一部分。解决方案架构师正在与公司的运营团队合作构建应用程序。哪些活动是公司运营团队的职责？ （选择三项。）
question_text.en: A company wants to use Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) clusters and Amazon RDS DB instances to build and run a payment processing application. The company will run the application in its on-premises data center for compliance purposes. A solutions architect wants to use AWS Outposts as part of the solution. The solutions architect is working with the company's operational team to build the application. Which activities are the responsibility of the company's operational team? (Choose three.)

A.zh: 为 Outposts 机架提供弹性电源和网络连接
A.en: Providing resilient power and network connectivity to the Outposts racks

B.zh: 管理在 Outposts 上运行的虚拟化管理程序、存储系统和 AWS 服务
B.en: Managing the virtualization hypervisor, storage systems, and the AWS services that run on Outposts

C.zh: 数据中心环境的物理安全和访问控制
C.en: Physical security and access controls of the data center environment

D.zh: Outposts 基础设施的可用性，包括 Outposts 机架内的电源、服务器和网络设备
D.en: Availability of the Outposts infrastructure including the power supplies, servers, and networking equipment within the Outposts racks

F.zh: 为 Amazon ECS 集群提供额外容量，以减少服务器故障和维护事件
F.en: Providing extra capacity for Amazon ECS clusters to mitigate server failures and maintenance events

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：为 Outposts 机架提供弹性电源和网络连接 正确。客户负责为 AWS Outposts 机架提供可靠的电源和网络连接，因为 Outposts 是安装在客户数据中心的设备， AWS 无法直接管理这些基础设施。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: Providing resilient power and network connectivity to the Outposts racks Correct. Customers are responsible for providing reliable power and network connectivity to AWS Outposts racks because Outposts are devices installed in customer data centers and AWS cannot directly manage these infrastructures.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：管理在 Outposts 错误上运行的虚拟化管理程序、存储系统和 AWS 服务。 AWS负责管理Outposts上的虚拟化层、存储系统和AWS服务，客户不需要承担这些责任。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Managing the virtualization hypervisor, storage systems, and the AWS services that run on Outposts errors. AWS is responsible for managing the virtualization layer, storage system and AWS services on Outposts, and customers do not need to bear these responsibilities.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：数据中心环境的物理安全和访问控制 正确。由于 Outposts 机架安装在客户的物理环境中，因此客户负责数据中心的物理安全和访问控制。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: Physical security and access controls of the data center environment Correct. The customer is responsible for the physical security and access control of the data center as the Outposts racks are installed in the customer's physical environment.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：前哨机架错误。 Outposts 基础设施的可用性由 AWS 处理，包括机架内的电源、服务器和网络设备。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Outposts racks error. Availability of the Outposts infrastructure is handled by AWS, including power supplies, servers, and network equipment within the racks.

E.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Outposts 组件的物理维护错误。 Outposts 组件的物理维护由 AWS 负责，客户无需进行硬件维护。
E.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Physical maintenance of Outposts components Error. The physical maintenance of Outposts components is handled by AWS, and customers do not need to perform hardware maintenance.

F.zh: 正確。技术原因：为 Amazon ECS 集群提供额外容量，以减少服务器故障和维护事件 正确。客户有责任为其 Amazon ECS 集群提供额外的容量，以响应服务器故障和维护事件。
F.en: Correct. Technical reason: Providing extra capacity for Amazon ECS clusters to mitigate server failures and maintenance events Correct. It is the customer's responsibility to provide additional capacity to their Amazon ECS cluster to respond to server failures and maintenance events.

answer_text.zh: A. 为 Outposts 机架提供弹性电源和网络连接；C. 数据中心环境的物理安全和访问控制；F. 为 Amazon ECS 集群提供额外容量，以减少服务器故障和维护事件
answer_text.en: A. Providing resilient power and network connectivity to the Outposts racks; C. Physical security and access controls of the data center environment; F. Providing extra capacity for Amazon ECS clusters to mitigate server failures and maintenance events

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： ACF (55%) ACE (26%) Other。热门讨论与考点摘要：为 Outposts 机架提供弹性电源和网络连接 正确。客户负责为 AWS Outposts 机架提供可靠的电源和网络连接，因为 Outposts 是安装在客户数据中心的设备， AWS 无法直接管理这些基础设施。；数据中心环境的物理安全和访问控制 正确。由于 Outposts 机架安装在客户的物理环境中，因此客户负责数据中心的物理安全和访问控制。；为 Amazon ECS 集群提供额外容量，以减少服务器故障和维护事件 正确。客户有责任为其 Amazon ECS 集群提供额外的容量，以响应服务器故障和维护事件。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: ACF (55%) ACE (26%) Other. Popular discussion and key point summary: Providing resilient power and network connectivity to the Outposts racks Correct. Customers are responsible for providing reliable power and network connectivity to AWS Outposts racks because Outposts are devices installed in customer data centers and AWS cannot directly manage these infrastructures.; Physical security and access controls of the data center environment Correct. The customer is responsible for the physical security and access control of the data center as the Outposts racks are installed in the customer's physical environment.; Providing extra capacity for Amazon ECS clusters to mitigate server failures and maintenance events Correct. It is the customer's responsibility to provide additional capacity to their Amazon ECS cluster to respond to server failures and maintenance events.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 某公司正计划将基于TCP的应用程序迁移到公司的VPC中。该应用程序可通过公司数据中心的硬件设备通过非标准 TCP 端口公开访问。该公共端点每秒可以处理多达 300 万个请求，并且延迟较低。该公司要求 AWS 中的新公共端点具有相同水平的性能。解决方案架构师应该建议什么来满足此要求？
question_text.en: A company is planning to migrate a TCP-based application into the company's VPC. The application is publicly accessible on a nonstandard TCP port through a hardware appliance in the company's data center. This public endpoint can process up to 3 million requests per second with low latency. The company requires the same level of performance for the new public endpoint in AWS. What should a solutions architect recommend to meet this requirement?

A.zh: 部署网络负载均衡器 (NLB)。将 NLB 配置为可通过应用程序所需的 TCP 端口公开访问。
A.en: Deploy a Network Load Balancer (NLB). Configure the NLB to be publicly accessible over the TCP port that the application requires.

B.zh: 部署应用程序负载均衡器 (ALB)。将 ALB 配置为可通过应用程序所需的 TCP 端口公开访问。
B.en: Deploy an Application Load Balancer (ALB). Configure the ALB to be publicly accessible over the TCP port that the application requires.

C.zh: 部署一个 Amazon CloudFront 分配来侦听应用程序所需的 TCP 端口。使用应用程序负载均衡器作为源。
C.en: Deploy an Amazon CloudFront distribution that listens on the TCP port that the application requires. Use an Application Load Balancer as the origin.

D.zh: 部署使用应用程序所需的 TCP 端口配置的 Amazon API Gateway API。使用预置并发配置 AWS Lambda 函数来处理请求。
D.en: Deploy an Amazon API Gateway API that is configured with the TCP port that the application requires. Configure AWS Lambda functions with provisioned concurrency to process the requests.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因： NLB 是专门为处理高性能、低延迟 TCP/UDP 流量而设计的负载均衡器，能够支持每秒数百万个请求的吞吐量。支持非标准TCP端口，完全满足出题要求。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: NLB is a load balancer specifically designed to handle high-performance and low-latency TCP/UDP traffic, capable of supporting throughput of millions of requests per second. Supports non-standard TCP ports and fully meets the question requirements.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： ALB主要用于HTTP/HTTPS流量，不支持非标准TCP端口。性能不如NLB，无法满足每秒300万个请求的需求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: ALB is mainly used for HTTP/HTTPS traffic and does not support non-standard TCP ports. The performance is not as good as NLB and cannot meet the demand of 3 million requests per second.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： CloudFront主要用于内容分发和HTTP/HTTPS流量的优化。不支持直接监听非标准TCP端口。使用ALB作为源也无法满足高性能TCP流量的需求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: CloudFront is mainly used for content distribution and optimization of HTTP/HTTPS traffic. It does not support direct monitoring of non-standard TCP ports. Using ALB as a source also cannot meet the needs of high-performance TCP traffic.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： API网关主要用于HTTP/HTTPS API流量，不支持非标准TCP端口。 Lambda函数的并发处理能力有限，无法满足每秒300万个请求的需求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: API Gateway is mainly used for HTTP/HTTPS API traffic and does not support non-standard TCP ports. The concurrent processing capability of the Lambda function is limited and cannot meet the demand of 3 million requests per second.
